summary: Made two surgical seam edits: lightly strengthened the morning-after entry from Chapter 10 and sharpened the final image so it hands off more directly into Chapter 12's market-continuing opening. The opening scaffold was left intact because it already differs from the visible adjacent opening, and no style-bible calibration/example lines appeared verbatim in the chapter.
edits: Anchored the opening sentence more explicitly in the same morning to tighten the carryover from Chapter 10.
Adjusted the closing image to foreground the market stalls' indifferent return by morning, aligning the exit with Chapter 12's opening.
